companyAnnouncements: 💰 MODEL COST LADDER: Haiku ($) → Sonnet ($$) → Opus ($$$). Default is Haiku. Switch with /model only when the task warrants it.
💰 EFFORT COST LADDER: medium ($) → high ($$) → max ($$$). Default is medium. Bump with /effort only for complex multi-step reasoning.
